reviews.review_description: I love the game because they have nice moderators

I love this game,I’ve been playing this game sense last summer, but I’ve realized is that not a lot of people play this fan game and there are not very many updates, but other than that I don’t see anything wrong with it, I’ve made a moderator friend like DuckyVR, and I like helping out the community, the owner is nice and so are the moderators. I can see this game going big one day. Overall I game this game 5 big booms 💥💥💥💥💥=5/5 ⭐️
